label: C4 Ultra Tiny Menu Face
prompt:
Use case: logo-brand.
Asset type: macOS app icon, menu bar icon, and product status icon system.
Product name/context: 观察者 / Observer, a friendly playful utility product that monitors app/system state and changes its icon when something needs attention.

Create a square logo concept sheet for one coherent icon direction. The sheet should contain: one polished large app icon, a neat row of tiny menu bar/status variants, and enough white/neutral space to evaluate the mark. Do not make a marketing poster.

Required status variants shown visually: normal, scanning/monitoring, minor issue, warning, critical, paused, offline. Variants must be understandable by shape as well as color, so they still work in monochrome.

Style requirements: vector-friendly, modern macOS app icon polish, crisp rounded geometry, friendly but not childish, product-grade, readable at 16px-24px menu bar size. Use graphite/white/off-white base, teal normal, sky blue scanning, amber warning, orange alert, coral red critical, neutral gray paused/offline.

Hard avoids: no realistic eye, no creepy surveillance camera, no robot head, no circuit board, no generic AI purple-blue gradient, no mockup devices, no watermark, no rendered text, no letters, no captions, no labels inside the generated image.

Direction family C: Tiny Observer Face.
Specific idea: design from the 16px menu bar icon upward. Ultra-simple face: rounded frame, two dots, one short expression line or scan bar. It must survive tiny size first, then become a charming app icon.
Show light and dark menu bar style variants if possible, plus the seven status states. No decorative mascot features.
